---
title: " "
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    df_print: paged
    css: styles.css
---
<div class="page-title">Research Projects</div>

<p class="research-intro">An overview of my current and past research. Each project explores a different intersection of molecular biology and real-world application.</p>

<div class="research-cards">
<a class="research-card" href="research-bph.html">
<div class="research-card-img"><img src="images/research-bph.jpg" alt="Utah Lake" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:center center;"></div>
<div class="research-card-body">
<div class="research-card-title">Engineering Cyanobacteria to Degrade PCBs</div>
<p class="research-card-hook">Modifying cyanobacteria to break down persistent organic pollutants while suppressing toxin production.</p>
</div>
</a>
<a class="research-card" href="research-mars.html">
<div class="research-card-img"><img src="images/research-mars.jpeg" alt="Cyanobacteria bioreactor"></div>
<div class="research-card-body">
<div class="research-card-title">Cyanobacterial Oxygen Production Under Simulated Mars Conditions</div>
<p class="research-card-hook">Investigating cyanobacterial growth as a foundation for oxygen and biomass production off-world.</p>
</div>
</a>
<a class="research-card" href="research-phylo.html">
<div class="research-card-img"><img src="images/pglo-expression-plate.jpeg" alt="GFP expression in E. coli" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:center 60%;"></div>
<div class="research-card-body">
<div class="research-card-title">Lab Experience & Projects</div>
<p class="research-card-hook">Shorter-term work spanning phylogenetics, yeast transformation, protein production, and data analysis.</p>
</div>
</a>
